scripts.build: npm run content:generate && vite build && npm run prerender:static && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.cjs
scripts.preview:prod: npm run build && NODE_ENV=production PORT=4173 node dist/server.cjs
scripts.pack:hostinger: npm run clean && npm run build && mkdir -p ../deploy && zip -rq ../deploy/bowlerproshop-hostinger-node.zip . -x 'node_modules/*' '.env' '.DS_Store'
scripts.verify:prod: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run smoke:prod && cd .. && node scripts/crawl-bowlerproshop-rendered.mjs
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=${CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID:-a0c9f7df7dc2450542b92bf137c59cbd} npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=bowlerproshop-mvp --branch=${ION_DEPLOY_BRANCH:-preview} --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=${CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID:-a0c9f7df7dc2450542b92bf137c59cbd} npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=bowlerproshop-mvp --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
